commands.author: ladygege

target.title: fix(feishu): retry on send rate-limit errors (230020/230006)
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds retry logic (up to 2 retries, 500ms/1000ms linear backoff) to `requestFeishuApi` for Feishu send rate-limit error codes `230020` and `230006`.
- Exports `getFeishuSendRateLimitCode()` helper to detect retryable codes from AxiosError response shape.
- Adds 22 unit/integration tests covering concurrent send, retry exhaustion, backoff timing, and error message surfacing.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.retry.test.ts` вЂ” 13 tests pass (retry logic, backoff, error detection)
- [x] `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/send.concurrent.test.ts` вЂ” 9 tests pass (concurrent sends, rate-limit handling)
- [x] Real 20-concurrent-send stress test against live Feishu API: all 20 messages succeed after retry

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Feishu plugin now retries transient rate-limit errors instead of failing immediately. Previously, concurrent message sends would lose messages due to unretried `230020` rate-limit rejections.

**Real environment tested**: Live Feishu API (`open.feishu.cn`), app `cli_aa947bd28afa5bd9`, target user `ou_33af95b6f9c0e5fbcaccef732f03d720`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
npx tsx scripts/feishu-stress-real.mts
```
This script imports `requestFeishuApi` directly from `extensions/feishu/src/comment-shared.ts` via tsx, creates a real `@larksuiteoapi/node-sdk` Lark Client, and fires 20 concurrent `im.message.create` calls through the retry-enabled code path.

**Evidence after fix** (terminal output):
```
[config] appId=cli_aa947bd28afa5bd9  target=ou_33af95b6f9c0e5fbcaccef732f03d720  count=20
[info]: [ 'client ready' ]

Firing 20 concurrent sends through requestFeishuApi (with retry) вЂ¦

[error]: [ [ { code: 230020, msg: 'This operation triggers the frequency limit, ext=chat rate limit' } ] ]
  (Г—10 total rate-limit hits on initial burst вЂ” all retried automatically)

  [10] вњ“ 1609ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec44878f0a0b3c1c92d40adb2d
  [20] вњ“ 1613ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec448782ca0b1c56b3f9cac777
  [11] вњ“ 1627ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487850a0b1934d47f23f5ee
  [14] вњ“ 1637ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487868a4b3f596e27de6c4b
  [02] вњ“ 1652ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487858b0b023114c191d336
  [15] вњ“ 1662ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487840a8b15f54046d7d0ea
  [05] вњ“ 1677ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487840a4b1213b8923b3c3a
  [08] вњ“ 1692ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec448786ca4b1c8ac25594efe5
  [03] вњ“ 1703ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4487858a0b29ed60da19ae30
  [18] вњ“ 1714ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec448786cb4b207b14952a9dee
  [19] вњ“ 2662ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec44808a8b4b17af883db1454a  (retried after 500ms backoff)
  [09] вњ“ 2662ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480830a8b30d327c34be279
  [04] вњ“ 2663ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480844a0b1f4f6bf451679b
  [07] вњ“ 2672ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec448083938b1ff8cf375d4a76
  [06] вњ“ 2674ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480848a4b27b2dbb4b9f45e
  [13] вњ“ 2674ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480860b0b19394478878473
  [16] вњ“ 2674ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480874a8b13c9fad79a253d
  [12] вњ“ 2678ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480ba0a4b3f9101f6d511c6
  [01] вњ“ 2682ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480bc8a0b15bf15073a3ba3
  [17] вњ“ 2708ms  msg_id=om_x100b6ec4480bc478b1fe39b7f652100

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ summary в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
  total     : 20
  succeeded : 20
  failed    : 0
  wall time : 2709 ms
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
```

**Visual proof** (Feishu chat screenshot showing all 20 messages received):

Before fix: messages were lost due to unretried rate-limit errors.
After fix: all 20 concurrent messages delivered successfully (see screenshot in comment below).

**Observed result after fix**: 10/20 requests initially received `230020` rate-limit on the burst. After automatic 500ms backoff retry, all 10 succeeded. **20/20 total success, zero message loss.**

**What was not tested**: Code `230006` was not triggered in the test environment. The reply path (`client.im.message.reply`) is not yet covered by retry вЂ” tracked as follow-up.

Closes #70879
